description_long: This is a modern bungalow surrounded by lush landscaping, including mature trees, shrubs, and flowering plants. The structure features a flat roof with multiple levels, large rectangular windows, and a combination of light gray and white exterior walls accented by darker trim. The front facade includes a driveway leading to a garage, a paved walkway, and a small garden area. The rear and side yards are enclosed by hedges and trees, providing privacy and a sense of seclusion. The property is well-integrated with its natural surroundings, with outdoor living spaces and garden beds visible. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a harmonious blend of architecture and nature.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large windows, surrounded by mature trees and landscaped gardens. The property features a garage, paved driveway, and private outdoor spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, garage, driveway, and landscaped front yard with trees and shrubs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, side yard, and dense tree coverage at the rear of the property.
description_view_2: Rear view dominated by mature trees, with the back of the bungalow partially visible through the foliage.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view showing the garden, side yard, and the integration of the bungalow with surrounding trees.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large rectangular windows on multiple facades
